_description: JSON schemas for Recovery-specific task types. Each type extends the base task schema (task_id, title, description, status, priority, project_id, owner_agent_id) with domain-specific fields.
_note: These schemas validate the 'metadata' JSON field that gets stored alongside the base task record in RuntimeDB.

base_task._description: Fields inherited from the existing Bomba SR task system. These are NOT redefined here — they already exist in the tasks table.

task_type.description: Recovery domain classification. Determines which schema, workflow, and routing rules apply.

priority_score.description: Computed numeric priority (0-100) from priority_scoring.json weights. Maps to existing priority field: 0-25=low, 26-50=medium, 51-75=high, 76-100=critical.

stage.description: Current workflow stage from workflow_stages.json. More granular than generic status field.

assigned_being.description: The Recovery being currently responsible. Set by being_routing.json rules, written to owner_agent_id.

agreement._description: Tasks related to closing deals, contracts, and formal agreements. Primary domain of the-agreement-maker.

contact_name.description: Primary contact or company name for this agreement.

contact_email.description: Primary contact email for communication tracking.

agreement_type.description: Classification of agreement. Affects default workflow stages and SLA timelines.

estimated_value.description: Projected revenue value in USD. Key input to priority scoring (revenue_impact weight).

actual_value.description: Final signed value. Populated at close. Used for forecast accuracy tracking.

decision_maker.description: Name of the person with signing authority. Critical for routing — agreements without identified decision-makers get flagged.

deadline.description: Target close date. Feeds time_sensitivity scoring and escalation triggers.

objections.description: Tracked objections raised during negotiation. Informs agreement-maker strategy.

contract_url.description: Link to contract document (Google Drive, DocuSign, etc).

source_channel.description: How this opportunity originated. Feeds channel effectiveness analytics.

partnership._description: Tasks for building and managing strategic partnerships. Shared between connector (outreach/relationship) and agreement-maker (formalization).

partner_contact.description: Primary point of contact at the partner organization.

partnership_type.description: Partnership classification. Determines workflow complexity and approval requirements.

mutual_value_prop.description: What each side gets. Must be articulated before advancing past 'qualification' stage.

strategic_alignment_score.description: Manual assessment of how well this partnership aligns with Recovery's mission (0-10). Feeds priority scoring.

existing_relationship.description: Whether there's a pre-existing relationship. Affects routing — warm intros go to connector, cold outreach to different flow.

integration_requirements.description: Technical or operational requirements for the partnership to function.

revenue_model.description: How money flows in this partnership.

renewal_date.description: When partnership terms are up for renewal. Feeds retention/keeper scheduling.

retention._description: Tasks focused on keeping existing relationships healthy and preventing churn. Primary domain of the keeper being.

account_value.description: Current annual revenue from this account. Directly feeds priority scoring.

retention_trigger.description: What triggered this retention task. Determines urgency and response playbook.

health_score.description: Account health score (0-100). Below 40 = critical, 40-60 = at-risk, 60-80 = healthy, 80+ = champion.

last_interaction_date.description: When we last meaningfully engaged this account. Gaps > 30 days trigger automated outreach.

churn_risk.description: Assessed churn probability. Critical = immediate keeper intervention.

lifetime_value.description: Total historical revenue from this account. Context for how much effort to invest in retention.

renewal_date.description: Contract renewal date. Tasks auto-created 90/60/30 days before renewal.

save_offer.description: What we can offer to retain (discount, upgrade, custom terms). Populated by keeper during intervention.

outcome.description: Final outcome of the retention effort. Feeds retention rate metrics.

pr._description: Public relations tasks — media outreach, brand building, crisis management, thought leadership. Shared between connector (relationships) and multiplier (amplification).

pr_type.description: PR activity classification. Determines workflow and approval chain.

target_audience.description: Who this PR effort is trying to reach. Guides channel selection and messaging.

media_contacts.description: Journalists, editors, or influencers being engaged for this PR effort.

key_messages.description: Core messages to communicate. Max 3 for clarity.

embargo_date.description: If applicable, when the information can be made public.

coverage_results.description: Actual coverage achieved. Feeds PR effectiveness metrics.

urgency.description: Proactive = planned campaign. Reactive = responding to event. Crisis = immediate response required.

approval_required.description: Whether this PR output needs approval before release. Crisis responses may bypass.
